dsl_rule.translation_notes: White candle formation detected by: (1) positive body (close > open), and (2) close above previous candle's high. Exit condition set to close below previous close as reasonable reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT. Success rates (60-65%) noted in parameters but applied as regime context rather than probabilistic threshold. Pattern applies across both bull and bear markets per source.

backtest_rule.reason: White candle formation detected by: (1) positive body (close > open), and (2) close above previous candle's high. Exit condition set to close below previous close as reasonable reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT. Success rates (60-65%) noted in parameters but applied as regime context rather than probabilistic threshold. Pattern applies across both bull and bear markets per source.

source_rule_text: Candle Pattern: White candlesticks predict upward breakout direction; regardless of existing trend, expect upward breakout between 60% (bear market) and 65% (bull market) of the time.
